hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); sys.exit(1) if any(x in cmd for x in ['rm -rf','DROP TABLE','sudo rm']) else print('ok')"
python3 -c "import os; print('\n[Stop hook] Run complete. Outputs in src/outputs/') if os.path.exists('src/outputs/aggregated.json') else print('[Stop hook] Warning: aggregated.json not found')"
python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(f\"[hook] Subagent done: {d.get('agent_type','unknown')}\")" 2>/dev/null || true
